name: Configuration
description: Build a Configuration from joint values, names, and types. Values in radians (revolute) or meters (prismatic). Use as input to ConfigurationTarget or SetRobotConfiguration.

inputParameters.name: joint_values
inputParameters.description: Joint values (radians for revolute/continuous, meters for prismatic).

inputParameters.name: joint_names
inputParameters.description: Joint names matching `joint_values` order. Optional but most planners require them.

inputParameters.name: joint_types
inputParameters.description: Joint type per value (compas_robots.model.Joint: 0=fixed, 1=revolute, 2=continuous, 3=prismatic, 4=floating, 5=planar). Defaults to all revolute.
